Notes: Gillian Bjerke leads CU with 16 points..Sara Leidall leads SMSU with game-high
19 points...Mustangs shoot just 60.9 percent from the line...Golden Bears
connect on seven three-pointers in the first half and shoot 45.0 percent
Game.Officials: Tony Schrepfer,  Troy Test,  Randy Waagmeester
